text: When you're ready to make this real: data/config.json, then point crm_root at your people. I'll get out of the way.
Shared media below this thread has my reading list for you. The suggested-reply buttons above the compose box work too — try drafting a reply to me.
Morning. I'm Vira — your AI chief of staff. This conversation is the tour. Tap this card to open my page.
